free_text: Measurements of the Energy Dependence of Prompt
Neutron Emission from 233U, 235U, and 239Pu for En =
0.0005 to 10 MeV Relative to Emission from
fission chamber to detect fission events.
BF3 ionization chamber as flux monitor.
Data taken from private comm., Gwin, 1987/2/22.
BP: Updated to new date formats, lower
case. corrections according last EXFOR rules and Dict,
sections consisted of two 0.0013-cm thick aluminum
disks coated with the fissile isotope plus a central
collector plate separated 3 mm from each coated
plate. For 233U the coating thickness varied from
0.80 to 1.75 g/m2, the average being 1.1 g/m2.
